name: Anglo-Eastern Univan Group Ltd.
h1: Anglo-Eastern Univan's GCC footprint in India
lede: Anglo-Eastern Univan runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Navi Mumbai, Mumbai and New Delhi, covering CoE and ssc, built over seventeen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Anglo-Eastern Univan office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Anglo-Eastern Univan GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Anglo-Eastern Univan runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Navi Mumbai, Mumbai, New Delhi), covering CoE and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Anglo-Eastern Univan's India footprint covers Navi Mumbai, Mumbai and New Delhi, spanning CoE and ssc. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Anglo-Eastern Univan operate in India?
faq.a: Anglo-Eastern Univan operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Anglo-Eastern Univan have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Anglo-Eastern Univan's India GCC footprint spans Navi Mumbai, Mumbai and New Delhi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Anglo-Eastern Univan run in India?
faq.a: Anglo-Eastern Univan runs CoE and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Anglo-Eastern Univan's India GCCs?
faq.a: Anglo-Eastern Univan's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Anglo-Eastern Univan's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Anglo-Eastern Univan's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
